title: PridefulWool
description: Adds more inclusive wool, carpets and stairs into Minecraft!
body:
Adds more inclusive wool, carpets and stairs into Minecraft!

## About This mod adds Wool Blocks, Carpets & Stairs of LGBTQ+ Pride Flags! This mod includes the following flags: - Gay Men - Genderflux - Demiboy - Six Color - Transgender - Nonbinary - Asexual - Pansexual - Abrosexual - Heterosexual - Maverique - Graysexual - Gender Queer - Straight Ally
